name: google-ads-agent
description: Google Ads management skills, commands, and expert context for Gemini CLI — campaign analysis, auditing, optimization, and security auditing. Ported from production learnings at googleadsagent.ai.

settings.name: Google Ads Developer Token
settings.description: Your Google Ads API developer token from ads.google.com → Tools & Settings → API Center

settings.name: Google Ads Client ID
settings.description: OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

settings.name: Google Ads Client Secret
settings.description: OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

settings.name: Google Ads Refresh Token
settings.description: OAuth2 refresh token generated via OAuth playground or google-ads Python library
